This is a sample text file for testing the text parser.

It contains multiple lines of text to verify that the parser can:
1. Extract text content correctly
2. Count lines, words, and characters accurately
3. Handle different encodings including Unicode characters like 你好世界
4. Normalize whitespace properly

The file has more than 100 characters to meet the minimum requirement.

Additional content to ensure we have sufficient length for testing purposes.
This line should help verify that line counting works correctly.

End of test file.
